about_me_text:
I am a 21-year-old Computer Engineering student, currently in my fifth year at the Universidad Argentina de la Empresa, with 80% of my courses completed. I have a strong interest in software development and am seeking a job opportunity to apply and expand my knowledge.

Throughout my studies, I have acquired solid skills in technologies such as React, Spring Boot, and other key tools. I am motivated to participate in challenging projects that allow me to grow as a professional in the field of software development.
